requirements.description: Home page renders the hero, development banner, and skip link.
Keyboard users can jump directly to main content.
Desktop navigation lists and routes through configured pages.
Mobile drawer supports primary route navigation.
About content renders every configured card section.
Contact content renders every configured contact channel and CTA.
Technology index renders all configured technology cards in order.
Technology cards expose expected internal and external links.
Waitlist form blocks invalid email addresses before submit.
Waitlist form supports bot verification before submitting.
Waitlist form submits a trimmed email and shows success.
Waitlist form surfaces an already-on-waitlist response without silently clearing the email.
Waitlist form shows API/server error messages.
API V1 metadata endpoint exposes service and endpoint details.
Health endpoint covers basic and deep check modes.
Waitlist API rejects invalid origin, content type, email, and bot-check payloads.
Waitlist API exposes CORS preflight for allowed origins.
Profile routes distinguish public profile access from private dashboard authentication.
